value.found_quote: Every run can emit a structured record of model calls, tool calls, handoffs, guardrails, and custom spans, which you can inspect in the [Traces dashboard](https://platform.openai.com/traces).
value.rationale: The page describes built-in tracing in the Agents SDK, with traces inspectable in the Traces dashboard, substantiating the offering. It is presented as enabled by default and currently usable, indicating active status.
